# protonpass_item_wifi (Resource)

Manages a Proton Pass WiFi item.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "protonpass_item_wifi" "example" {
  share_id            = protonpass_vault.example.share_id
  title               = "WiFi"
  ssid                = "Net"
  password_wo         = "pw"
  password_wo_version = 1
  security            = "wpa3"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `share_id` (String)
- `title` (String)

### Optional

> **NOTE**: [Write-only arguments](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments) are supported in Terraform 1.11 and later.

- `password_wo` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) WiFi password (write-only).
- `password_wo_version` (Number)
- `security` (String) Security type (wpa2, wpa3, etc).
- `ssid` (String) WiFi network name (SSID).

### Read-Only

- `create_time` (String)
- `item_id` (String)
- `modify_time` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# WiFi items can be imported by specifying the share ID and item ID separated by a colon
terraform import protonpass_item_wifi.example "share_id:item_id"
```
